author: @MadhatClemens

text:
I've heard that. Who likes the DSi anyway? "Oh look, I traded the last great generation of games for A BETTER MIC AND A CAMERA, OMG!1!"
Everyone these days buys a game for one of two things.
1. It's of a TV show/Movie they like.
or
2. You remember it FROM THE CLASSIC GAMES!

Back then you were like "Holy Shit. This game looks so awesome, I gotta buy this!"
Now, I'm looking at the commercial for the newest Hannah Montana DSi game wondering if insurance will cover me punching a hole in the TV.
author: @MadhatClemens

text:
I hate how the new commercials are trying to pitch to adults instead of kids. Back in the day, commercials were made for teenagers, and they got you involved. These ones... BORING. I don't care if Christina Aguleria likes the new DS, she has no history as a gamer. There hasn't been a commercial this year that has set my blood pumping. For shame Nintendo, Shigeru Miyamoto is dying inside.

Nintendo Rep.: Hey, let's make another pokemon generation!

Shig.: Oh god...
